title: rosa afzeliana subsp. vosagiaca
intro: Rosa afzeliana subsp. vosagiaca is a subspecies of the Rosa afzeliana species, also known as the Afghan rose or Afghan wild rose, which is a type of fragrant, pink-flowering rose native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana subsp. vosagiaca include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating various gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
